title: Dyeable Compasses
description: Allows you to dye the compass needle to any color.
body: # Dyeable Compasses Allows you to dye the compass needle to any color. Works just like a regular compass, but with a color. Can combine dyes to make any color you desire (like leather armor). Remove the dye in a water cauldron. Also removes the enchantment glint from lodestone compasses because that just makes them harder to read for no gain.
